waiver.reason_summary: A break-glass production fix required a governed push before the normal validation lane could be fully restored.
waiver.detail: browser-runner service was deployed and running but not accessible due to missing firewall rules on docker-runtime-lv3. Added nftables rules for port 8096 from management network, all guests, and docker bridge networks.
substitute_evidence: browser-runner service responding on port 8096 from all required networks
waiver.remediation_ref: fcc3f06e8: Add browser-runner port 8096 firewall rules to docker-runtime-lv3
